acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence bundle includes capture metadata, encoded sample, hashes, logs, and notes.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: bundle-manifest.json contains captureMetadataSummary, encodedSample, referencedArtifacts with SHA-256 hashes and sizes, plus references to upstream/local logs and notes.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Sample artifact can be consumed by a non-Linux decoder later.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: sample-av1.ivf is stable at evidence/m2-nvenc-encode-sample/sample-av1.ivf and ffprobe validates IVF/AV1 Main with AV01 tag, yuv420p, 160x90, one frame.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: All unproven performance or zero-copy claims are explicitly absent or filed as findings.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: explicitNonClaims in bundle-manifest.json and notes.md exclude latency, direct DMA-BUF import, VideoToolbox decode, Metal render, HDR, no-CPU-readback after grim, and performance claims.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: qd findings exist for any known gaps.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: qd findings eed2a910-d829-46e8-af64-837ed01ed78e, 28358c32-733e-4e8e-8f6b-f5c2d4d13c99, 77eec369-a6fe-4261-8dcf-1fbd8a575ca7, fcaaae62-2275-44ce-ae76-a99e45e06cb8, and a2842577-9a8b-4601-862b-0cddb671c832 track the known gaps.

realWorldValidation.evidence: ffprobe successfully parsed the existing encoded sample; upstream reports record the Linux capture and NVENC encode hardware validation.

residualRisks: The bundle is a stable evidence reference, not a replacement for downstream Mac decoder validation.
The sample is intentionally a one-frame IVF artifact and is not representative of streaming duration or latency.
